description: The third day of Breakpoint 2022 at Pateo de Gale features a packed program with technical deep dives, workshops, and a closing ceremony. Attendees are encouraged to explore other venues and utilize noise-canceling headsets for better audio experience.
topic_summary: Day 3 of Breakpoint 2022 includes talks on smart messaging by Chris from Dialect, emphasizing interactive messaging capabilities in the Web3 ecosystem. The event concludes with a celebration featuring DJs.
